title: Welcome to the Laboratory
content:
Hello, World!

This is the first Lab Report successfully sent to the past1.

We have confirmed the operational status of the Personal Site (name subject to change). As of this divergence point, the lab is functioning correctly.

Future Lab Reports will be posted here. The v1 of the Personal Site (name subject to change) will have Steins;Gate references.

BTW, I decided to put some personalities to the site, because I want to make it more fun to see. The one theme I chose is Steins;Gate.

If you are curious about the references and interested in time travel sci-fi, I personally recommend you to watch the anime Steins;Gate. And if you care about ratings, it is now rated pretty high with 8.8/10.0 in IMDb2.

References

Footnotes
